# TrackFlow

TrackFlow is a logistics provider for e-commerce operations in the United States and Spain.

## Primary language
- English is the primary/default language.
- Spanish is available under /es/.

## Main pages
- Home (EN): https://trackflow.com/index.html
- Application form (EN): https://trackflow.com/application.html
- Privacy policy (EN): https://trackflow.com/privacy.html
- Home (ES): https://trackflow.com/es/index.html
- Application form (ES): https://trackflow.com/es/application.html
- Privacy policy (ES): https://trackflow.com/es/privacy.html

## Structured discovery
- Sitemap: https://trackflow.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://trackflow.com/robots.txt
- Full AI details: https://trackflow.com/llms-full.txt
- JSON AI context: https://trackflow.com/ai-context.json
- Well-known llms: https://trackflow.com/.well-known/llms.txt
- Well-known AI context: https://trackflow.com/.well-known/ai-context.json

## Organization
- Name: TrackFlow
- Website: https://trackflow.com
- Contact: comercial@trackflow.com
